_meta.purpose: Technical reference for another LLM to understand this codebase. Explains the full stack, data model, API contracts, file structure, and how the two services (Next.js web app + FastAPI inference service) communicate.

project.name: Milking Process Compliance Monitor
project.description: Computer-vision pipeline monitoring milking staff compliance. A FastAPI inference service reads an RTSP camera feed, runs YOLOv8 detection, and uses a state machine to infer milking task events. A Next.js web app provides supervisor dashboard, scheduling, live monitoring, analytics, and reporting.

web.styling: Vanilla CSS with custom properties (no Tailwind)

inference_service.ml_model: Ultralytics YOLOv8 (currently COCO pretrained, needs custom training)

database.orm: Drizzle ORM (TypeScript schema files in apps/web/lib/db/schema/)

data_model.description: Hierarchy: Session -> CowProcess -> TaskEvent. Sessions are supervisor-scheduled windows. CowProcesses are auto-detected per camera position. TaskEvents are individual milking tasks detected by the ML pipeline.

sessions.description: A supervisor-scheduled monitoring window. Covers 2 cow positions (camera FOV).

cow_processes.description: Auto-detected milking process for one cow position within a session. Created by the inference service.

task_events.description: Individual milking task detected by the inference service within a cow process.

reports.description: Generated DOCX compliance reports for sessions.

audit_log.description: Audit trail for all state changes (overrides, session edits, etc.).

milking_tasks.description: The 6 sequential tasks in a milking process. Each task has a specific detection signal (which YOLO classes must be present).
milking_tasks.note: Tasks are detected when ALL required classes are present in the same frame+ROI. Tasks are deduplicated — once completed for a (session, cow_position), they won't fire again.

POST /api/sessions.description: Create a new session (from multi-step form)
POST /api/sessions.body: { supervisor_id, employee_id, scheduled_start_time, estimated_end_time, row_1_cow_count, row_2_cow_count, employee_name, supervisor_name, supervisor_email }

GET /api/sessions/[sessionId].description: Get session detail with cow_processes and task_events

PUT /api/sessions/[sessionId]/employee.description: Update assigned employee for a session

POST /api/events/ingest.description: Inference service pushes task/cow_process events here. Requires Bearer token auth (INFERENCE_SERVICE_TOKEN).
POST /api/events/ingest.body: { session_id, event_type: 'task_event'|'cow_process', task_id?, cow_position, status, confidence_score, detected_start_time, detected_end_time, duration_seconds }

POST /api/task-events/[taskEventId]/over.description: Supervisor overrides a task event status

POST /api/reports/generate.description: Generate DOCX report for a session

GET /api/ws.description: SSE endpoint for real-time session updates

POST /session-window.side_effect: Spawns a background thread running the detection pipeline

POST /test-send.description: Send fake events to test the full pipeline (no camera needed)

inference_pipeline.description: The core ML pipeline running inside the inference service. Processes RTSP camera frames at 5 FPS.
flow: 1. RtspReader opens camera stream via OpenCV VideoCapture
2. ROI Splitter crops each frame into 2 regions (cow_position_1, cow_position_2) using config/rois.json coordinates
3. YoloDetector runs YOLOv8 inference on each ROI, returns Detection[] with class_name, confidence, bbox
4. CowProcessBoundaryDetector tracks when teat_cups_attached appears (process start) and teat_cups_detached appears (process end)
5. TaskStateMachine matches detection class_names against TASK_SIGNALS, emits task_event on match, tracks completed tasks to avoid duplicates
6. EventPublisher POSTs events to Next.js /api/events/ingest with 3x retry, never crashes the session thread

config_files.rois.json: Camera region-of-interest coordinates per cow position
config_files.thresholds.json: Per-task confidence thresholds and default values

event_flow.description: How data flows from camera to supervisor dashboard
steps: 1. Camera sends RTSP stream to inference service
2. Inference service detects objects, runs state machine, emits events via HTTP POST to /api/events/ingest
3. Web app /api/events/ingest validates auth token, writes to PostgreSQL (sessions, cow_processes, task_events tables)
4. Web app broadcasts event to connected SSE clients via /api/ws
5. Supervisor dashboard receives SSE update, re-renders live view with new task status

file_structure.description: Key files and their roles. Use this to navigate the codebase.

web_app.apps/web/app/(dashboard)/page.tsx: Main dashboard overview (accent-panel hero, metrics, task grid)
web_app.apps/web/app/(dashboard)/live/page.tsx: Live monitoring view (real-time task status per cow position)
System status (inference service, database, camera, model)
web_app.apps/web/app/(dashboard)/sessions/[sessi: Session detail with task events and audit trail
web_app.apps/web/components/layout/dashboard-she: Main layout with green sidebar (#1F4D3A) and navigation
web_app.apps/web/components/dashboard/live-sessi: Active session banner with live timer
web_app.apps/web/components/dashboard/task-check: Task completion checklist with override buttons
web_app.apps/web/components/dashboard/override-m: Dialog for supervisor to override task status
web_app.apps/web/lib/data/store.ts: All database access functions (649 lines, wraps Drizzle queries)
web_app.apps/web/lib/db/schema/: Drizzle ORM schema files (sessions, cow_processes, task_events, etc.)
web_app.apps/web/lib/security/sanitize.ts: HTML entity escaping for user input
web_app.apps/web/lib/security/rate-limit.ts: In-memory rate limiter with periodic cleanup
web_app.apps/web/middleware.ts: Route protection (requires auth for all routes except /sign-in, /sign-up, /api/auth)
web_app.apps/web/app/globals.css: All CSS design tokens (Cooperative theme: #F7F5EF canvas, #1F4D3A sidebar, Schibsted Grotesk font)

inference_service.apps/inference-service/src/main.py: FastAPI app with 5 endpoints, session management, thread safety
inference_service.apps/inference-service/src/runtime/sessi: Main pipeline loop: read frame -> split ROI -> detect -> state machine -> publish (5 FPS)
inference_service.apps/inference-service/src/ingestion/roi: NumPy-based frame cropping into ROI regions
inference_service.apps/inference-service/src/state_machine: 6-task FSM: maps YOLO detections to task lifecycle events
inference_service.apps/inference-service/src/events/event_: Build task_event and cow_process event payloads
inference_service.apps/inference-service/src/events/publis: HTTP POST publisher with 3x retry, never crashes session thread
inference_service.apps/inference-service/tests/: 19 tests (pytest): state machine, ROI splitter, API health, event contracts

config.docker-compose.yml: Postgres + web + inference-service (uses env vars, no hardcoded secrets)
config..github/workflows/ci.yml: CI: web-checks (tsc, lint, build, vitest), inference-checks (ruff, pytest), integration (docker smoke test)

design_system.description: Cooperative theme — calm, minimal, premium-cooperative aesthetic.
design_system.signature_component: SealRing — SVG circular progress ring with animated fill, used for compliance scores

css_classes.metric: Large number display in Schibsted Grotesk 700, tabular-nums
css_classes.label: Uppercase Schibsted Grotesk 600, small size
css_classes.data_row: Flex row with label and value, used for lists

web_app.INFERENCE_SERVICE_TOKEN: Bearer token for authenticating inference service events (required)
web_app.RESEND_API_KEY: Resend API key for email provider (optional, lazy-loaded)

inference_service.RTSP_STREAM_URL: Camera RTSP stream URL (required for inference)
inference_service.WEB_APP_INGEST_URL: Web app ingest endpoint (required, e.g. http://localhost:3000/api/events/ingest)
inference_service.MODEL_WEIGHTS_PATH: Path to YOLOv8 weights (optional, default: yolov8n.pt)

docker.POSTGRES_PASSWORD: Postgres password (REQUIRED, must be set in .env)

tests.tests/unit/test_task_state_machine.py: 7 tests — signal matching, dedup, positions, duration, confidence
tests.tests/unit/test_roi_splitter.py: 4 tests — frame splitting, cropping, value preservation

ci_cd.trigger: Push to main/dev, PRs to main

jobs.web-checks: TypeScript check, ESLint, Next.js build, Vitest tests
jobs.integration-checks: Docker Compose smoke test (health checks, curl endpoints)

known_issues: YOLO model uses COCO pretrained weights — detects 'person' but not milking-specific classes (spray_bottle, stripping_cup, teat_cups_attached, teat_cups_detached, dip_applicator). Custom training required.
Only 2 cow positions monitored (camera FOV limitation). Full-row coverage is Phase 2.
Rate limiting and SSE broadcast are in-memory (Map) — won't survive restarts or scale.
Events/ingest DB write failure is swallowed (intentional — event still broadcast via SSE).
next lint is deprecated in Next.js 15, will be removed in 16. ESLint config uses flat config format (eslint.config.mjs).

conventions_for_new_code.typescript: Use existing patterns in lib/data/store.ts for DB queries. All functions return Promise<RecordType>.
conventions_for_new_code.python: Use existing patterns in src/state_machine/ for state logic. All public methods return list[dict] (events).
conventions_for_new_code.css: Use design tokens from globals.css. No inline styles for colors — use CSS variables.
conventions_for_new_code.components: Check existing components in components/dashboard/ before creating new ones.
conventions_for_new_code.api_routes: Use existing auth pattern (Bearer token for ingest, NextAuth session for dashboard).
conventions_for_new_code.tests: Add tests for new functionality. JS: vitest in lib/__tests__/. Python: pytest in tests/unit/ or tests/api/.
